case_title: SAN FRANCISCO FLOWER MART, LLC, A CALIFORNIA VS. NORTH BAY FARM WHOLESALE LLC

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $179.33 PER DAY. (TRANSACTION ID # 100229478) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FLOWER MART, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FLOWER MART, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORTH BAY FARM WHOLESALE LLC THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 630-670 BRANNAN STREET AND 530-548 FIFTH STREET, STALL NOS. 31 AND 40 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100229478)** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY **
VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE (TRANSACTION ID # 100229478) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FLOWER MART, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FLOWER MART, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT NORTH BAY FARM WHOLESALE LLC SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION REGARDING ORIGINAL LEASE (TRANSACTION ID # 100229478) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FLOWER MART, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 72048229), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FLOWER MART, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED FEB-07-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NORTH BAY FARM WHOLESALE LLC
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100229478) AS TO DEFENDANT NORTH BAY FARM WHOLESALE LLC
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (COMMERCIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FLOWER MART, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT NORTH BAY FARM WHOLESALE LLC
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NORTH BAY FARM WHOLESALE LLC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT NORTH BAY FARM WHOLESALE LLC
